QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS 800+ Patents Published 45+ Patents Granted 250+ Student Patents Published 25L+ Patent Incentives PATENTS & COPYRIGHTS At Sri Eshwar, we provide expert guidance on patents and copyrights to protect valuable ideas as intellectual property

. Our Intellectual Property Rights team assists faculty and students in navigating the patent application process for their inventions, including conducting novelty searches, drafting applications, and managing submissions. We also assist in the registration of copyrights to protect original research works. Our team follow all legal requirements and standards. The dedicated IPR cell at Sri Eshwar is committed to protecting our innovations and creative works, enabling our community to focus on advancing their research and development efforts
